subcodes.first_line: O lover of humankind! Thy letter hath been received, and it telleth, God be praised, of thy health and well-being…. One must see in every human being only that which is worthy of praise
subcodes.first_line_orig: ای محب عالم انسانی نامه تو رسید الحمد لله دلیل بر صحت و سلامت تو بود
subcodes.subjects: @stories; anecdotes, @forgiveness; a sin-covering eye; patience and forbearance, @serving humanity; working for progress, betterment of the world, @love, unity, and fellowship among the friends; in the Cause
